description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine seqd_2, and is implemented by a call to seqd_2. Use this API to factorize the sequence matrices in preparation for unbalanced fault calculations. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = seqd(options)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying options to be used in constructing the sequence matrices. (input).

options.description: dc line and FACTS device option (0 by default).
transformer impedance correction option (1 by default).
do not apply to zero sequence.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
